variations.title: Inline link as span
variations.html:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. This is long button text that needs to be a span so that it will wrap inline with the text around it. Sed hendrerit nisi in cursus maximus. Ut malesuada nisi turpis, in condimentum velit elementum non.


Note that using a span as a button does not fire the onclick event for Enter or Space keys. An onKeyDown event listener is needed for Enter and Space key presses to prevent their default behavior and trigger your code. Pressing the Enter or Space keys on the inline link as span above demonstrates this by triggering an alert.

actionItems.title: Inline span second example
actionItems.description: PF shows a second inline span button with keyboard event handling text. Add this to the PFJ showcase.

actionItems.title: Aria-disabled tooltip examples
actionItems.description: PF shows aria-disabled buttons with tooltips (primary button + secondary link-as-button). Implement tooltip support for aria-disabled buttons.

actionItems.title: Circle button variants
actionItems.description: PFJ missing 8 circle button variants (warning, link, control, plain, 3 stateful, upload). Add these to the showcase.

actionItems.title: Icon position modifiers
actionItems.description: Add pf-m-start / pf-m-end to pf-v6-c-button__icon spans across all sections (variant examples, disabled, stateful, etc.).

actionItems.title: Disabled button modifier
actionItems.description: PFJ adds pf-m-disabled to disabled buttons but PF does not. Remove pf-m-disabled from natively disabled buttons (keep only disabled attribute). Note: pf-m-disabled is correct for <a> elements where native disabled does not work.

actionItems.title: Badge disabled modifier
actionItems.description: PFJ disabled button badges missing pf-m-disabled on the pf-v6-c-badge span. PF adds pf-m-disabled to badges inside disabled buttons.

actionItems.title: Hamburger expand/collapse
actionItems.description: Add pf-m-expand and pf-m-collapse modifiers to hamburger button states.

actionItems.title: aria-label on icon-only buttons
actionItems.description: Multiple sections have icon-only buttons missing aria-label. Add appropriate aria-labels to plain, control, circle, and progress buttons.

actionItems.title: Disabled button aria-disabled
actionItems.description: PFJ adds aria-disabled=true to natively disabled buttons. PF only uses disabled. Remove redundant aria-disabled from buttons that already have disabled.

actionItems.title: Inline span type attribute
actionItems.description: PFJ inline span button missing type=button. Add it.

actionItems.title: Hamburger aria-expanded
actionItems.description: Add aria-expanded attribute to hamburger buttons.

actionItems.title: Stateful button icons
actionItems.description: PFJ uses FontAwesome icons (viewBox 0 0 448 512) for stateful buttons. PF uses Red Hat icons (viewBox 0 0 32 32). Align icon sets.

actionItems.title: CTA link arrow icon
actionItems.description: PFJ CTA link button uses FontAwesome arrow. PF uses a different icon. Align icon.

actionItems.title: Custom component section
actionItems.description: PF has a Custom component section not present in PFJ. Implement if the feature is supported.
